results.title: Salman Khan to begin 'Bigg Boss 20' shoot in September
results.description: Salman Khan, the beloved host of Bigg Boss, will reportedly begin shooting for the upcoming season on September 21.

results.title: Janhvi Kapoor to lead 'Tumbbad' director's horror film?
results.description: Actor Janhvi Kapoor is in advanced talks for a high-concept creature-horror film, directed by acclaimed filmmaker Rahi Anil Barve, per Pinkvilla.
